title: Shortlist
tagline: Movie recommendations that go beyond another trending list
summary: I wanted better movie recommendations. I also wanted to turn the model into an app instead of leaving it in a notebook. Python does the learning, Go keeps it fast, and the site lets anyone try it.
outcome: The recommendations beat my baseline by 11.8%, and the app returns them in about 17 milliseconds.
role: Built the ML model, Go API, and web app myself
proofPoints: 11.8% lift over the baseline in offline ranking evaluation
About 17 milliseconds for the current Go recommendation path
A live search and recommendation flow backed by MovieLens and TMDB
